text: One final word to the crowd, and on behalf of all the players, I just want to say that we're going to be lost without you. After thirty years of covering this tournament magnificently, please give it up for Sue Barker. Yeah. Just to say thank you so much, but this is about the tournament, and all I can say is that from now on, John McEnroe is going to be commentating on Court Seventeen. After that, going off script, but thank you. That that really does mean the world to me. It really does.
